provisions.title: Short title and commencement
provisions.content: This Act may be cited as the Estate Duty (Repeal) Act, and shall come into operation on the 1st April, 1996.

provisions.title: Repeal of Cap. 660 of the old edition
provisions.content: The Estate Duty Act is hereby repealed. Since 2012, ZambiaLII has been hosted by the Southern African Institute for Policy and Research (SAIPAR) , an independent, educational and development-oriented research centre.
